message:
refactor(engine): hoist SplitBenchmarkMetrics::zero() and fix type reference

Add a proper zero() constructor to SplitBenchmarkMetrics (the correct
type, vs the previous BenchmarkSplitMetrics which doesn't exist) and
hoist the zero binding above the match arms in build_delta_summary to
reduce duplication. The zero fallback semantics from the prior commit
are preserved — missing split metrics still produce a zero-valued delta
rather than panicking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
